title: rubus spinuliger
intro: Rubus spinuliger, also known as the thorny bramble or prickly raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus spinuliger include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, with some traditional herbalists also using it in salves and ointments to aid in skin conditions.
